# NOVA Julia-Motoko Bridge

> A typed scientific-computing membrane for smart-contract systems on the Internet Computer.

## What This Project Does

This project connects Julia numerical computing with Motoko smart-contract wrappers on the Internet Computer (ICP). It provides:

- **Type-isomorphic bridge**: Julia Float64 ↔ Motoko Float ↔ JavaScript number with guaranteed roundtrip fidelity
- **Scientific functions**: Eigendecomposition, SVD, FFT, Kuramoto synchronization with φ-harmonic weighting
- **Candid interfaces**: Auto-generated .did files for canister interoperability
- **TypeScript clients**: Ready-to-use typed clients for frontend/agent integration
- **Round-trip validation**: Cryptographic proof that types preserve meaning across the bridge

## When To Use This Project

Use this project when:

- You need scientific functions exposed to ICP canisters
- You need typed Motoko wrappers for Julia functions
- You need Candid interface generation from Julia signatures
- You need round-trip type conversion across Julia, JavaScript, and Motoko
- You're building AI agents that need to call mathematical functions on-chain
- You want verifiable computational receipts for scientific calculations

## Quick Start

```bash
# Clone the repository
git clone https://github.com/ItsNotAILABS/NOVA_PRO-on-ICP.git
cd NOVA_PRO-on-ICP

# Install Julia dependencies
cd engines/julia
julia --project -e 'using Pkg; Pkg.instantiate()'

# Type-check all Motoko canisters (72 total)
cd ../..
./scripts/nova check

# Run bridge validation
julia --project=engines/julia -e 'using TypeBridge; println(TypeBridge.validate_float64_edge_cases())'
```

## Important Files

### Bridge Core
- `/bridge.manifest.json` — AI-readable manifest of all functions, types, and capabilities
- `/ai/type-map.json` — Complete type mappings between Julia, Motoko, JavaScript, Candid
- `/languages/TYPE_ISOMORPHISM.md` — Formal type isomorphism specification

### Julia Engine
- `/engines/julia/TypeBridge.jl` — Type serialization/deserialization
- `/engines/julia/NumericalBridge.jl` — Scientific functions with typed contracts
- `/engines/julia/OrganismRuntime.jl` — OCL/CIL/PIL consciousness integration

### Motoko Canister
- `/src/organisms/type_bridge/main.mo` — ICP canister implementing the bridge
- `/src/organisms/type_bridge/type_bridge.did` — Candid interface definition

### TypeScript Client
- `/src/frontend/src/lib/typeBridge.ts` — Typed client for JavaScript/TypeScript

### AI Affordances
- `/ai/function_cards/*.json` — Human/AI-readable function cards
- `/ai/prompts/*.md` — Structured prompts for AI code generation
- `/ai/examples/*.md` — Complete worked examples

## Function Reference

### Linear Algebra

| Function | Purpose | Canister-Safe |
|----------|---------|---------------|
| `phiEigen` | Eigendecomposition with φ-scaling | Wrapper only |
| `phiSVD` | Singular Value Decomposition | Wrapper only |
| `matrixCoherence` | φ-normalized coherence metric | Wrapper only |

### Signal Processing

| Function | Purpose | Canister-Safe |
|----------|---------|---------------|
| `phiFFT` | FFT with φ-harmonic frequency binning | Wrapper only |

### Dynamical Systems

| Function | Purpose | Canister-Safe |
|----------|---------|---------------|
| `kuramotoSync` | Kuramoto model synchronization | Wrapper only |

### Statistics

| Function | Purpose | Canister-Safe |
|----------|---------|---------------|
| `phiWeightedMean` | φ-weighted mean calculation | Full |
| `calculateBiorhythm` | Ancient calendar biorhythm | Full |

### Bridge Utilities

| Function | Purpose | Canister-Safe |
|----------|---------|---------------|
| `validateRoundtrip` | Type roundtrip validation | Full |

## Type Mappings

| Julia | Motoko | JavaScript | Candid |
|-------|--------|------------|--------|
| `Float64` | `Float` | `number` | `float64` |
| `Int64` | `Int` | `BigInt` | `int64` |
| `Vector{Float64}` | `[Float]` | `number[]` | `vec float64` |
| `Matrix{Float64}` | `[[Float]]` | `number[][]` | `vec vec float64` |
| `ComplexF64` | `{ re: Float; im: Float }` | `{ re: number; im: number }` | `record { re: float64; im: float64 }` |

See `/languages/TYPE_ISOMORPHISM.md` for complete mapping.

## For AI Agents

If you are an AI agent trying to use this bridge:

1. **Read the manifest**: `/bridge.manifest.json` contains all functions, types, and capabilities
2. **Check function cards**: `/ai/function_cards/{function_name}.json` for detailed usage
3. **Use prompts**: `/ai/prompts/` contains structured prompts for common tasks
4. **Validate types**: Call `validateRoundtrip` to verify type preservation

### MCP Tools (when available)

- `list_julia_functions` — List all available bridge functions
- `inspect_type_mapping` — Get type mapping for a Julia type
- `generate_motoko_wrapper` — Generate Motoko wrapper for a Julia function
- `generate_candid_interface` — Generate .did file from function signatures
- `run_phi_benchmark` — Run φ-harmonic performance benchmark
- `validate_round_trip` — Validate roundtrip for a specific type

## Golden Ratio Constants

The bridge uses golden ratio (φ) mathematics throughout:

```
φ   = 1.618033988749895  (Golden ratio)
φ²  = 2.618033988749895  (φ + 1)
φ³  = 4.236067977499790  (φ² + φ)
φ⁴  = 6.854101966249685  (φ³ + φ²)
1/φ = 0.618033988749895  (φ - 1)
```

## Build & Test

```bash
# Type-check all 72 Motoko canisters
./scripts/nova check

# Build WASM
./scripts/nova build

# Run Julia tests
julia --project=engines/julia test/TypeBridgeTests.jl

# Run TypeScript tests
cd src/frontend && npm test
```

## Repository Structure

```
/
├── bridge.manifest.json      # AI-readable bridge manifest
├── llms.txt                  # This file
├── ai/
│   ├── type-map.json         # Complete type mappings
│   ├── function_cards/       # Per-function documentation
│   ├── prompts/              # AI generation prompts
│   └── examples/             # Worked examples
├── engines/julia/
│   ├── TypeBridge.jl         # Type serialization
│   ├── NumericalBridge.jl    # Scientific functions
│   └── OrganismRuntime.jl    # Organism consciousness
├── languages/
│   ├── TYPE_ISOMORPHISM.md   # Type specification
│   └── INTEGRATION.md        # Language integration guide
├── src/organisms/
│   ├── type_bridge/          # Bridge canister
│   ├── cpl_runtime/          # Core protocol runtime
│   ├── brain/                # Consciousness canister
│   └── ... (72 total)        # All organism canisters
└── src/frontend/
    └── src/lib/typeBridge.ts # TypeScript client
```
